raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Un uu irr mums kahdu
masu Brihdi/ un kahdu Azzu-
mirkli Schehlastiba notikkufi no
ta KUNGA muhsu Deewa/ ka
mums kahds isspruzzis Pul-
zinsch atlizzis/ un ka mums wee-
na Nagle dohta taptu ak muhsu
Deews! un mums mas Atsptig-
tchanas dohts taptu muhsu
Wehrgoschanâ."
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Jo mehs effam Wehrgi/
tonehr muhsu Deews muhs ne
irr atstabjis muhsu Wehrgoscha-
nâ/ bet irr Schehlastibu us
nnuns greejis preeksch teem Per-
seru Rehnizieim/ ka tee mums
mas Atsptigfchanas dohtu/ par
Pa-augstinafschann ta Namuna
muhsu Deewa/ un par wirka
pohstu Weetu Uszeltchanu/ un ka
mums dohta taptu weena Seh-
tina ceelsch Juhda un Jerusa-
lemes."
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Un nu/ ko fazzifim mehs/
ak muhsu Deews! pehz scho/ jo
mehs effam no taweem Bauf-
keim atkahpuschees/"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Ko tu effi pawehlejs zaur
tawo Kalpo to Prawescho Roh-
fu/ un fazzijs : Ta Semune /
kurp juhs eetat to eemantoht/ irr
weena neschkibsta Semune/ zaur
Netschkistibu to Semmes
stahweht."
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Tad uu juws ne bu
juhsas Meitas winnu Dehlee
dohf/ nedg winnu Meitas juh
Dehleem xemt/neds winnu M
ru nedg winnu Labbumu m
leht muhschigi/ tapehz ka ju
ftipri tohpat/ un to Semm
Labbumu ehft/ un juhjeem Bet
neem par Gemantoschanu do
warrat muhschigi."
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Un pehz to wisnu/ k
pahr mums nahzis irr/ muh
taunu Darbu un muhsas lee
Wainas deht/ effi tu muh
Deews (to Dusmibu) aistu
rejs muhsu Noseegumu deht/ u
effi mums weenu issprukkufch
Pulzinu dewis/ itt ka schis irr"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Bij tad mums uu atk
nogreestees tawus Bauslus ni
zinaht/ un apdraudinatees
teem Faudim schahdas Negant
bas. Neggi tu prett mums a
skaitifees lihds paschu Isdeld
fchanu/ ka ne kahda Atliffchan
nedg Issprukfschana buhs?"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Ak KUNGS! tu Jsra
ka Deews/ tu effi taijns/ jo meh
effam atliekuschi weens isspru
zis Pulzinsch/ itt ka tas schodee
irr/ Redsi/ mehs effam preekf
tawa Watga eeksch muhtu N
feeguma/ jo ne weens irr/ ka
tapehz tawâ Preekfschâ warr pa"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
